/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -ffast-math -march=native -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kinetic_fps.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kinetic_fps.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o kinetic_fps  /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lXtst /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
